creator: laurent@daverio.net
text:
(In reply to Matthias Fechner from comment #6)

Thank you, that's probably the best way to go :)

I was staying with "quarterly" binary packages because it was the default option (and using `portupgrade` for upgrading packages instead), but "latest" is probably better in all respects.

Thanks again, I can't understand the problem, but I need my Gitlab and I can live without understanding what was wrong :)
